title: Composition HIR pass, mod-host query bridge, host definitions

source.subject: feat(compiler): composition, macros, structured API docs, and resolver fixes

body:
## Outcome

Composition, macros, structured API docs, and resolver fixes.

## Context

- Workstream **analysis-pipeline** — compiler pipeline and api.json spine.
- Contributes to deliverable **Composition HIR & macro expansion** (`v02-composition-macros-hir`).
- Macro work follows platform-spec **language-meta/macros** semantics (registry, expand pass, resolver re-resolve).

## Platform specification

- Implements [Composition assembly](https://beskid-lang.org/platform-spec/compiler/pipeline/composition-assembly) (`/platform-spec/compiler/pipeline/composition-assembly`) *(required)*

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`efb67a5`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/efb67a5) — feat(compiler): composition, macros, structured API docs, and resolver fixes
